title: pentaphragma ellipticum
intro: Pentaphragma ellipticum is a species of flowering plant in the family Pentaphragmataceae, native to New Caledonia, and is characterized by its unique elliptical leaves and small white flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Pentaphragma ellipticum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and roots are typically harvested and dried for medicinal use.
